_notation_legend.octave_middle: plain letter, e.g. S R G M P D N
_notation_legend.octave_upper: letter followed by apostrophe, e.g. S' = dot-above Ṡ
_notation_legend.octave_lower: comma before letter, e.g. ,N = underlined lower N
_notation_legend.sustain: -- means the previous swara is held
_notation_legend.block_type_grid: a taal-marker table of swara rows (sargamgeet-style)
_notation_legend.block_type_grid_with_lyrics: a taal-marker table with matched swara + lyric rows (laxangeet/bandish-style)
_notation_legend.status_pending_verification: blocks tagged this way were intentionally NOT transcribed yet (dense drill grids, no lyric anchor) - do a focused pass on the photo before trusting them
_notation_legend.block_type_alankar_set: a running list of AROH/AVROH swara-phrases (no taal-column grid, no lyrics) - used for pure practice-drill pages. Optional 'taal' names the rhythmic cycle the book associates with the drill. Optional 'confidence': 'verify_against_photo' flags sets where handwritten octave dots were hard to disambiguate from the scan.
_notation_legend.komal_swara_note: From Kafi/Khamaj/Des onward the raag uses komal (flattened) Gandhar/Nishad per the 'vikrat' field. This book marks that with an underline (the same mark used elsewhere for lower-octave notes), so komal swaras in these later pages are transcribed here in plain uppercase and flagged confidence: verify_against_photo rather than guessed at - please check the underlines in sourceImage before treating them as certain.

source: Goonjan Kala Kendra - Alankar Praveshika notebook
sourceImageConvention: each page object has a 'sourceImage' path (assets/pages/page_NNN.jpg, zero-padded to 3 digits, matching pageNumber). Drop your original page photos into that Flutter asset folder using this exact naming so the app can show the source snapshot next to the transcribed content for verification.

pages.title: Bheempalas Aalap Stayi / Aalap Antara / Taan Stayi / Taan Antara
pages.note: Continuation of page 23. Four drill grids (Aalap Stayi, Aalap Antara, Taan Stayi, Taan Antara) not transcribed yet - dense, no lyric anchor, consistent with how other raags' aalap/taan pages were handled in this book.

pages.title: Rag Kafi
pages.note: This thaat (and Khamaj/Des further ahead) uses komal (flattened) swaras - Gandhar and Nishad here. The source book marks these with an underline under the swara letter, same mark it uses elsewhere for lower-octave swaras. Where a note is both underlined AND clearly meant as komal (per the 'vikrat' field) rather than lower-octave, it's transcribed here in plain uppercase and flagged with confidence: verify_against_photo rather than guessing - please cross-check the underlines against sourceImage before trusting exact swara identity.

blocks.label: Stayi lyrics
blocks.content: Guni gaavatha kaafi raga kharaharapriya mela janitha, komala gani ujwala para sura panchama vaadi naada

blocks.label: Antara lyrics
blocks.content: Sarala swaroopavi parichitha maanatha sabasudha avikala, aashraya guni chathura kahatha komala gani ujwala para sura panchama vaadi naada

blocks.label: Antara
blocks.note: The last two rows repeat the 'Ko-ma la gani... / Su ra pan-cha ma...' line, exactly as printed in the book (antara reuses the stayi's closing line).

blocks.label: Stayi lyrics
blocks.content: Aaja khelo shyaam sanga holi, Aaja pichakaari ranga bhari kesar ki

blocks.label: Antara lyrics
blocks.content: Kuvaka kanhaiyyaa sanga sakhi raadhaa, Ranga bhari jori sohathari

pages.title: Rag Khamaj
pages.note: Margin annotations on this page (Shadhava Sampurna jaathi note, min 5/max 7 note count rule, Avnava/Sompurna jaathi labels, and a Shudda/Komal swara key at the bottom: Shudda - NS, NR; Komal - DN, PN) are handwritten asides in the book, kept here as a page-level note rather than structured data. Komal Nishad is used here (vikrat), transcribed in plain uppercase - cross-check against sourceImage.

vistar: M P M G R S
S G R S N D P
D N D P M G R S

blocks.label: Stayi lyrics

blocks.label: Antara lyrics

data.aroh_note: Book writes aroh as 'S R G M P D N S (N R G M D N S)' - the parenthetical variant with tivra Madhyam (M') is the more commonly sung phrase.
vistar: G M' D N D P

blocks.label: Stayi lyrics

blocks.label: Antara lyrics

blocks.label: Stayi / Sanchari / Antara / Abhoga
blocks.note: Rows are labelled in the book as Stayi, Sanchari, Antara, and Abhoga respectively (Dhrupad's four-part form) rather than the usual Stayi/Antara pair.

blocks.label: Raag Bhoopala - Taal Bhajan Teka - lyrics
blocks.content: Gaayiye ganapati jaga vandana, Shankara sumana bhavaani nandana / Siddhi sadana gajavadana vinaayak, Krapaa sindhu sundara sabalaayaka / Modaka priya muda mangaladaataa, Vidya vaaridhi buddhi pradhaataa / Maangata tulasidaasa karajore, Basahi raama siyaa maanasa more

blocks.label: Swara key
blocks.content: S = Shadj, R = Rishab, G = Gandhar, M = Madyam, P = Pancham, D = Daivat, N = Nishad
